steps.action: Open rum-traffic page with valid domain/domainkey
Evaluate state.chartData sample rows in page context
steps.expected: Rows include t,cnt_ok,cnt_4xx,cnt_5xx and numeric non-negative values
steps.observed: 132 points loaded; first 3 rows had required keys and non-negative numeric values

evidence.network: RUM bundles requests issued to bundles.aem.page during load

steps.action: Evaluate fetchRumData(...) in page context for current range
steps.expected: Breakdown rows include dim,cnt,cnt_ok,cnt_4xx,cnt_5xx with valid invariants
steps.observed: Facet samples for url and userAgent returned rows with correct keys/types, non-negative numbers, and cnt_ok+cnt_4xx+cnt_5xx==cnt

evidence.network: RUM bundles requests issued to bundles.aem.page during adapter fetch

assertions.title: Network error shows user-visible error

steps.expected: Dashboard should show a visible error message
steps.observed: Dashboard remained visible with no user-visible error text

steps.action: Inspect loginError and visible error-like text in DOM
steps.observed: loginError empty/non-visible; no visible error-like text found

evidence.network: Request interception applied via agent-browser route abort for https://bundles.aem.page/**

assertions.issues: Silent failure on network error: no user-visible error state

assertions.title: Invalid domain shows empty/error state

steps.expected: UI shows empty-data message or error state without JS exceptions
steps.observed: No visible empty/error message; dashboard remained visible with no breakdown rows

assertions.issues: Expected empty/error message was not shown

assertions.title: Invalid domainkey returns error

steps.action: Confirm API response with invalid domainkey via curl

steps.observed: No visible auth error; login remained hidden and dashboard stayed visible

assertions.issues: Auth failure is not surfaced to the user

steps.action: In page context, request future range (+30 days) using fetchRumData
steps.expected: Empty bundles result for future range
steps.observed: chartPoints=0, all breakdown row counts=0, totals all zero, error=null

steps.action: Render returned zero-data chart and empty breakdown tables
steps.expected: Zero-data chart and empty breakdown state with no JS exceptions
steps.observed: Zero-data render captured; rendered breakdown rows=0; no console errors

evidence.network: Future-range adapter call: 2026-05-14..2026-05-20 returned empty bundles

frictions.description: RUM UI offers only relative ranges (7d/30d/365d); no direct future-date selector is exposed.
frictions.resolution: Validated VAL-DATA-011 by invoking fetchRumData for a future range in page context, then rendering returned zero-data payload through existing chart/breakdown renderers.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-DATA-006, VAL-DATA-007, VAL-DATA-011) and 3 failed (VAL-DATA-008, VAL-DATA-009, VAL-DATA-010). Failures were due to missing user-visible error/auth states under network/auth/domain failure conditions.
